ddls:
CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the candidate */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the political party the candidate belongs to */,
  "electoral_district_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the electoral district the candidate is running in */,
  "registered_date" TEXT /* Date the candidate registered for the election */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biographical information about the candidate */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the candidate */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the candidate */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the candidate */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the candidate */,
  "photo" TEXT /* Candidate's photo */,
  "manifesto" TEXT /* Candidate's manifesto or platform */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Candidate's social media links */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidates_electoral_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("electoral_district_id") REFERENCES electoral_districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each political party */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the political party */,
  "abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the political party */,
  "founded_date" TEXT /* Date the party was founded */,
  "leader" TEXT /* Name of the current leader of the party */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the party */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the party's mission and values */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Ideology of the party (e.g., left, right, center) */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color associated with the party */,
  "logo" TEXT /* Logo of the party */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electoral_districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electoral district */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the electoral district */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the district is located */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the district */,
  "registered_voters" INTEGER /* Number of registered voters in the district */,
  "geographical_area" TEXT /* Geographical area of the district */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the district, including notable features and demographics */,
  "boundary_map" TEXT /* Map of the district's boundaries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the election (e.g., General Election 2023) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the election was held */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of election (e.g., national, regional, local) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election, including its scope and significance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the election (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "electoral_system" TEXT /* Electoral system used (e.g., first-past-the-post, proportional representation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES election_types ("type_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES election_status ("status_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_elections_electoral_system FOREIGN KEY ("electoral_system") REFERENCES electoral_systems ("system_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidate_elections" (
  "candidate_election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate's participation in an election */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the candidate is running for */,
  "campaign_url" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's campaign website */,
  "running_mate" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate's running mate (if any) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_elections_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_candidate_elections_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote record */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "votes_cast" INTEGER /* Number of votes cast for the candidate */,
  "percentage_votes" REAL /* Percentage of total votes received by the candidate */,
  "elected" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the candidate was elected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data entry, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Array of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the action occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was affected */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was performed */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Details of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the electoral district */,
  "winner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the winning candidate */,
  "total_votes_cast" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast in the election */,
  "voter_turnout" REAL /* Percentage of registered voters who participated in the election */,
  "election_officer" TEXT /* Name of the election officer responsible for the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES electoral_districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_winner_id FOREIGN KEY ("winner_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_registration" (
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registered voter */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the electoral district where the voter is registered */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the voter */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the voter */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the voter registered to vote */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the voter's registration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the voter (e.g., phone number, email) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_registration_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES electoral_districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voter_turnout" (
  "turnout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voter turnout record */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the electoral district */,
  "voter_id" INTEGER /* ID of the voter */,
  "voted" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the voter voted */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the voter cast their vote */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method of voting (e.g., in-person, absentee, mail-in) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("turnout_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES electoral_districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_voter_id FOREIGN KEY ("voter_id") REFERENCES voter_registration ("voter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voter_turnout_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the election type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the election status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the election status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "electoral_systems" (
  "system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each electoral system */,
  "system_name" TEXT /* Name of the electoral system */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the electoral system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("system_id")
)
